name: Multiple employers exposed me to hazards before diagnosis in Farmington, who pays?
description: Typically last employer under injurious exposure doctrine.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: Multiple employers exposed me to hazards before diagnosis in Farmington, who pays?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically last employer under injurious exposure doctrine.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Last injurious exposure rule in Utah/Idaho attributes to recent employer if aggravating.[1][2] Key factors: Prove chain; apportion liability; file against all if needed.[2] Track employment history precisely. Legal expert allocates responsibility correctly.
